title: nf-core/cfpipe pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

fastq_1.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz' or '.fastq'

fastq_2.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz' or '.fastq'

methylated_bam.errorMessage: Bam file containing methylated reads from MeD-seq assay.

assay.errorMessage: Assay used for generating sequencing reads.

sex.errorMessage: Sex of sample can be used in custom IchorCNA script
